ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Frustrated repeat caller threatens to switch providers. Agent escalates to supervisor with 2-hour callback commitment.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: I'm extremely frustrated. This is the third time I'm calling about the same issue.
Agent: I sincerely apologize. Let me review your case history.
Customer: Every time I call, I get a different answer. Nobody seems to know what's going on.
Agent: I understand your frustration. I'm going to escalate this to our senior team.
Customer: I want this resolved today or I'm switching providers.
Agent: I've marked this as urgent. A supervisor will call you within 2 hours.
